chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-107 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 725/2025 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 726/2025 4.For hearing of Bail Application 10-02-2025 Mr. Asif Ali Jatoi, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Ameer Ahmed Memon seeks protective bail in Crime No.301 of 2017, registered at P.S, A-section, Khairpur, for offences under Sections 365-B, 363 & 382 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police as NBWs have been issued against him by the trial Court. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of seven days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-(Fifty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs issued against applicant in the above crime shall remain suspended for the above period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
